codeReview.summary: The feature correctly renames PvmRiskEngine to DeterministicRiskModel, moves the deterministic math inline into RiskAdapter, and adds AccessManaged protection plus new tests. However, it does not fully close the quote-ticket storage-griefing path and it leaves deployMarketVersion producing partially wired market versions whose borrow path can revert after activation.

issues.description: The storage-griefing vector is still reachable because both publishCurrentQuoteTicket() and publishProjectedBorrowQuoteTicket() remain unrestricted external entry points that forward into RiskAdapter.quoteViaTicket(). Any EOA can keep creating fresh tickets via LendingCore, so the feature did not actually close the public quote-publication path it was supposed to remove.

deployMarketVersion() now deploys an AccessManaged RiskAdapter but never grants the new LendingCore the LENDING_CORE role or maps quoteViaTicket() to that role. Versions created by this helper are therefore not fully functional for borrowing unless each caller manually patches AccessManager wiring afterward. The manual workaround added in test/MarketMigrationCoordinator.ts:47-52 highlights the missing helper behavior, while scripts/liveLiquidationSmoke.ts:45-82 and scripts/upgradeOracle.ts:27-50 activate versions from this helper without adding that grant.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared architecture library is stale for milestone 6. It still documents the product path as RiskAdapter -> PvmQuoteProbe and describes quoteViaTicket() as the auto-publishing path, but the reviewed feature changes the architecture to inline deterministic math with optional verification against a separately named DeterministicRiskModel.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:17 and :42 still say 'riskEngine: RiskAdapter -> PvmQuoteProbe (PVM-compiled)' and 'Quote engine is PVM-compiled PvmQuoteProbe', which no longer matches unified-risk-gateway.

sharedStateObservations.observation: There is no shared-state note that deployMarketVersion() now needs extra AccessManager wiring for the new LENDING_CORE role before the deployed version can use RiskAdapter.quoteViaTicket(). One test had to add that wiring manually, but scripts using the helper do not show the same requirement.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: dualvm/lib/deployment/deployMarketVersion.ts returns at lines 133-138 without any RiskAdapter role mapping; dualvm/test/MarketMigrationCoordinator.ts:47-52 manually grants ROLE_IDS.LENDING_CORE and sets quoteViaTicket; AGENTS.md and .factory/library/ do not document this requirement.

summary: Fail: the feature's main refactor landed, but two blocking gaps remain — public quote-ticket publication is still reachable through LendingCore, and deployMarketVersion() does not finish the new RiskAdapter access-control wiring needed for functional upgraded versions.
